description: Create a NextGen Connect channel named 'Patient DB Writer' that extracts patient data from the PID segment of HL7 messages and writes it to the 'patient_records' table in a PostgreSQL database. The channel must listen on TCP port 6663 and populate columns for patient_id, last_name, first_name, date of birth, and gender. The destination connector XML must include a <responseTransformer> element. Database connection: jdbc:postgresql://nextgen-postgres:5432/mirthdb (username: postgres, password: postgres). A sample ADT message is available at /home/ga/sample_adt_message.hl7. Use the REST API at https://localhost:8443/api (admin/admin, header 'X-Requested-With: OpenAPI') for configuration; the web dashboard is monitoring-only.
